description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Passenger generic binaries tests CI tests. The workflow should trigger on push to stable-* and feature/* branches and on pull requests to those branches. It should have two jobs, build_linux and build_macos, each running on a different OS and building binaries for x86_64 and aarch64 architectures. Each job should check out the repository, set up environment variables, and run scripts to build and test binaries. The build_linux job should use docker/setup-qemu-action and docker/setup-buildx-action, while the build_macos job should install Ruby using rvm and run additional preparation scripts.
